output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?population WHERE {
  wd:Q22538 p:P1082 ?populationStatement .
  ?populationStatement ps:P1082 ?population ; pq:P585 ?time .
  FILTER(year(?time) = 1975)
}
output.answer:
The SPARQL query executed for entity Q22538 (Poverty Bay, New Zealand) retrieved a population of 2333 for the year 1975. This aligns with the user's request to find the population of the city where the Poverty Bay Rugby Football Union played during the 1975 Romania Rugby Union Tour of New Zealand. The entity Q22538 corresponds to the location associated with the team, and the query successfully retrieved the historical population data for that year.

<answer>
2333
</answer>
